scope_statement: Algebraic backbone of §3.9 only: T2 universal over 24-bit BV; T3 universal over both ML-KEM (q=3329, w=24) and ML-DSA (q=8380417, w=24) deployed share domains; T4 universal at three configurations (ML-KEM w=24, ML-DSA w=24 deployed-tight, ML-DSA w=46 conservative bound); T5 universal over Z_3329 raw-RNG domain; T6 two-case enumeration at q=5; T1 small-domain finite expansion of Theorem 3.9.1 at q=5. Fully-universal Theorem 3.9.1 reported as future work in §6.
